title: Hazel's Various Wings
description: Adds a handful of Terraria style wings to the game.
body:
### **Requires [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets) and [Fabric Api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) to work!**

BIG NOTE HERE: as of currently, it's messed up in multiplayer, but works just fine in signleplayer :3

This mod adds multiple wings that can be equiped in the cape slot with the Trinkets mod.

Wings can be crafted and found and are meant to get better as you progress through the game.
Later wings in the game will allow you to glide, most wings do not.
Wing recipes unlock as you play so something like JEI is not required.
**This mod replaces the elytra, keep this in mind if using this in a mod pack!**

> Feedback, for example balancing, is greatly appreciated! (discord linked on the side)

#

Planned features (no realease window):
- en_lol and tok translations
- Special wings for when the create mod is installed
- Custom enchantments (maybe)

#

This mod was made by Hazel. D3v1s0m did some code. Aslerix made all the art and it was used with permission.
#

You are allowed to add this mod in any modpack if given clear credit :)
(I'd also apreciate if you showed the modpack in my discord server linked on the side)
